role: Test suites for the ArchSpine CLI commands and related workflows.
responsibility: Provide comprehensive integration and unit tests to validate the CLI's sync, check, fix, usage reporting, LLM interaction, publish preflight, view, and other commands, ensuring correct behavior in isolated and realistic environments.

children.role: E2E integration test suite for the CLI sync workflow and related operations, validating the full lifecycle including initialization, sync, check, fix, usage reporting, and LLM interaction with a custom mock client.
Vitest integration test suite for the LLM command UI output formatting and status display
Vitest test suite for the publish-preflight pre-validation logic.
Integration test suite for the built CLI sync command and related operations.
Vitest integration test suite for sync command CLI argument validation in repair mode
Test suite for the ArchSpine view command.
